textByHashes.4c7778ba3fae0c984ee0b4d56d9d265d0d8bac3d: Welcome to the King's Axe inn! What can I help you with?
textByHashes.8d12711984d343783da70f6ead42730acd9b60c3: Go to the bar downstairs. I only deal with residents.
textByHashes.a433ae9a70b1f8cd9d5d73b2d5edc04dc7bf1aab: No, just guests that stay the night.
